languages.text: "Полагаю, никто не рассудит вернее вас, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "Полагаю, никто не рассудит вернее вас, Лорд-капитан".

languages.text: "I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "Полагаю, никто не рассудит вернее вас, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."
"I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."
"I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."
"I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."

languages.text: 「あなたの意見ほど重みのある意見は、誰も持っていないと思います、キャプテン卿。」
languages.original_text: "I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの意見ほど重みのある意見は、誰も持っていないと思います、キャプテン卿。」

languages.text: “我认为，没有什么比您的意见更有分量，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: "I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: “我认为，没有什么比您的意见更有分量，舰长大人。”

languages.text: "İnanıyorum ki hiç kimsenin görüşü daha fazla ağırlık taşıyamaz Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: "I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "İnanıyorum ki hiç kimsenin görüşü daha fazla ağırlık taşıyamaz Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: «Creo que su opinión tiene más peso que ninguna otra, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «Creo que su opinión tiene más peso que ninguna otra, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: « Je pense que votre avis a plus de poids que celui de quiconque, seigneur-capitaine. »
languages.original_text: "I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: « Je pense que votre avis a plus de poids que celui de quiconque, seigneur-capitaine. »

languages.text: "Ich glaube, niemandes Meinung hat mehr Gewicht als Eure, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "I believe that no one's opinion carries more weight than yours, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Ich glaube, niemandes Meinung hat mehr Gewicht als Eure, Lord Captain."
